operation: Start on the XY workplane and create a rectangular box of 30×25×15. Select the top face facing positive Z and create a new workplane, then draw an ellipse with semi-axes 12 and 8 and extrude it 5 units upward. On the top face of the elliptical extrusion, create another workplane, center the sketch at coordinates (-10, 5), and create a countersunk hole with diameter 4.5, countersunk diameter 8.0, countersunk angle 82 degrees, that cuts through the entire part.
geometry: The model consists of a thick rectangular base with an elliptical boss protruding from the top face. A single countersunk hole is placed off-center on the elliptical boss, ready for fastener installation.
function: This part provides a solid rectangular base with an elliptical locating feature and a countersunk hole for screw mounting, suitable as a foundation component in a mechanical assembly.
